description: Product Description Perfect addition in your glasses collection Crafted from high-quality materials, our shot glasses offer durability and elegance in one package. With their sleek design and smooth finish, they are a joy to hold and admire, ensuring every shot is a moment to savor. Bar essential heavy bottom glasses will add elegance to your shot glass collection Bar essential Suitable for different liquors Excellent Gift European craftsmanship Dishwasher safe Transparency Each glass allows user to see the color, clarity, and level of the beverage inside, also contribute to the visual appeal of table settings and presentations, making them popular choices for both everyday use and special occasions Thick Base Shot Glasses Thick base provides stability and prevents the shot glass from easily tipping over, especially when it's filled with liquid, making it less prone to breakage, giving it a modern and stylish look High Quality A safe and practical option for enjoying beverages without the risk of lead contamination, making them a popular choice for households, restaurants, and other food and beverage establishments Superior Craftsmanship elegant and timeless design glasses are crafted with meticulous attention using advanced glassmaking techniques with precision molds. This results in glasses with smooth edges, uniform thickness, and flawless finishes Functionally crafted glasses are slightly tilted upwards to release taste and aroma of alcohol and thickness at the bottom makes it aesthetically robust .Timeless design adds a touch of sophistication to any occasion. Enjoy your favorite spirits in style. Perfect finish glasses can be safely washed in a dishwasher without incurring damage, it is designed to withstand the mechanical action, water temperature, and detergent used in dishwashers without warping, discoloration, or any other adverse effects.
